input.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import json, glob
queries={
'drug_boat':['drug-trafficking boat','drug-smuggling vessel','eastern Pacific','survivor','remains','transferred'],
'french_bank':['foiled explosive','Paris headquarters','BNP Paribas','Societe Generale','Credit Agricole','bank bombing'],
'irgc_funeral':['funeral','IRGC spokesman','Alimohammad Naini','Ali Mohammad Naini','Ali Mohammad Naeini','Ramezan Sharif','spokesman'],
'mattala':['Mattala','combat aircraft','land two','Sri Lanka publicly identify'],
'jerusalem':['Jerusalem','Old City','Al-Aqsa','Temple Mount','missile shrapnel','explosion','sirens'],
'toddler_rubble':['toddler','rubble','rescued','Civil Defense','Red Crescent','Lebanese Red Cross'],
'sudan_hospital':['Sudan','teaching hospital','hospital attacked','North Darfur','Khartoum','Kordofan'],
'mass_grave':['mass grave','dozens of bodies','exhumed','children'],
'eritrea_eswatini':['Eritrea','Eswatini','AFCON','Africa Cup of Nations qualifying','Asmara','Benghazi'],
'hezbollah_target':['Hezbollah','Kiryat Shmona','Metula','Nahariya','Manara','Margaliot','northern Israel'],
}
files=sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/03/18/articles.jsonl'))
for name,pats in queries.items():
    hits=[]
    for path in files:
        for line in open(path,encoding='utf-8'):
            a=json.loads(line); text=(a.get('title') or '')+'\n'+(a.get('content') or '')
            low=text.lower()
            if any(p.lower() in low for p in pats):
                if name=='drug_boat' and not (('drug' in low or 'eastern pacific' in low) and ('boat' in low or 'vessel' in low or 'survivor' in low or 'remains' in low)): continue
                if name=='irgc_funeral' and not ('funeral' in low and ('irgc' in low or 'spokesman' in low or 'naini' in low or 'naeini' in low or 'sharif' in low)): continue
                if name=='jerusalem' and not ('jerusalem' in low and ('missile' in low or 'shrapnel' in low or 'siren' in low or 'explosion' in low or 'old city' in low)): continue
                if name=='toddler_rubble' and not ('toddler' in low or ('rubble' in low and ('rescued' in low or 'rescue' in low))): continue
                if name=='sudan_hospital' and not ('sudan' in low and 'hospital' in low): continue
                if name=='mass_grave' and not ('mass grave' in low or ('exhum' in low and 'bodies' in low)): continue
                if name=='eritra_eswatini' and not False: pass
                if name=='hezbollah_target' and not ('hezbollah' in low and ('rocket' in low or 'target' in low or 'northern israel' in low or 'kiryat' in low or 'metula' in low)): continue
                idx=min([low.find(p.lower()) for p in pats if low.find(p.lower())!=-1] or [0])
                hits.append((a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),a.get('title'),text[max(0,idx-350):min(len(text),idx+1200)].replace('\n',' ')))
    print('\n###',name,'hits',len(hits))
    for h in hits[:8]:
        print('---',h[0],h[1],h[2])
        print(h[3][:1500])
PY

There is no universal limit, but experts generally suggest: 1-2 glasses per day for healthy adults Avoid binge consumption (multiple servings in a short time) Adjust intake based on health conditions Moderation is key. Coconut water can be part of a healthy diet, but not the only source of hydration. Coconut water remains a refreshing and nutritious summer drink when consumed in moderation. However, its growing popularity as a "health drink" has overshadowed an important fact, even natural beverages can cause harm when overconsumed. From electrolyte imbalance to digestive issues and rare but serious complications like hyperkalemia, excessive intake carries real risks, especially for vulnerable individuals. As summer temperatures rise, the safest approach is a balanced one: Combine coconut water with regular water intake, listen to your body, and consult a healthcare professional if you have underlying health conditions. Afghanistan vows to avenge deadly Kabul bombing but says open to talks KABUL - A mass funeral for some of the hundreds of victims of a Pakistani strike on a Kabul drug treatment centre was held in Afghanistan on March 18, with the Taliban government promising retribution but leaving the door open for talks to end the conflict. On a rainswept hillside above Kabul, Afghan Red Crescent Society volunteers carried dozens of simple wooden coffins from a fleet of ambulances to a mass grave dug in the rocky ground by giant excavators. At the graveside, Interior Minister Sirajuddin Haqqani said they were innocent victims targeted by “criminals”, days before the end of the Muslim holy month of Ramadan. “Today is a sad day. I offer my condolences to Afghanistan, especially to the families of the martyrs,” he told mourners. “We will take revenge,” he added and warned those behind the March 16 bombing: “We are not weak and helpless. You will see the consequences of your crimes.” But Mr Haqqani, who until last year had a US$10 million (S$12.8 million) bounty on his head, also suggested that talks were the government’s preferred option to halt the fighting. “We do not want war but the situation has come to this,” he said. “So, we are trying to solve the problems through diplomacy.

Israeli government plane parked in Berlin for safety

BERLIN, March 1 - Israel has flown its official government aircraft to Germany and parked it for safety at Berlin's airport, German government sources said, after U.S. and Israeli strikes killed Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei and plunged the region into conflict. Media reports citing data from the Flightradar24 flight tracking service said the aircraft departed Israel early on Saturday afternoon and circled over the Mediterranean before flying to Germany in the evening. The flight had been registered in advance by the Israeli government, the government sources said, adding that only crew members were on board. Israel's state aircraft, "Wing of Zion", is a Boeing 767 that has been specially equipped for official government trips. REUTERS

input.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import json, glob
for term in ['Mattala','Hambantota','IRIS Dena','Dena frigate','Sri Lanka air force','combat aircraft']:
    print('\nTERM', term)
    n=0
    for path in sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/03/*/articles.jsonl')):
        day=path.split('/')[-2]
        if day>'18': continue
        for line in open(path,encoding='utf-8'):
            a=json.loads(line); text=(a.get('title') or '')+'\n'+(a.get('content') or '')
            idx=text.lower().find(term.lower())
            if idx!=-1:
                n+=1; print('---',a.get('date_publish'),a.get('source'),a.get('title'),'[',path,']')
                print(text[max(0,idx-300):min(len(text),idx+1000)].replace('\n',' ')[:1400])
                if n>=8: break
        if n>=8: break
    print('hits',n)

input.cmd:
python - <<'PY'
import os, pandas as pd
print('state_exists', os.path.exists('state.json'))
if os.path.exists('state.json'):
    print(open('state.json',encoding='utf-8').read()[:6000])
df=pd.read_csv('market.csv', dtype={'qid':str})
print('rows', len(df), 'active', (~df.is_resolved).sum(), 'resolved', df.is_resolved.sum())
print('cols', list(df.columns))
res=df[df.is_resolved].copy(); res['resolution_date_dt']=pd.to_datetime(res['resolution_date'], errors='coerce')
print('\nlatest resolved')
for _,r in res.sort_values('resolution_date_dt', ascending=False).head(30).iterrows():
    print(r.qid, r.resolution_date, r.ground_truth, '|', str(r.title)[:190].replace('\n',' '), '| pred=', r.get('market_aggregate', r.get('my_prediction', None)))
act=df[~df.is_resolved].copy(); act['resolution_date_dt']=pd.to_datetime(act['resolution_date'], errors='coerce')
print('\nactive due soon')
for _,r in act.sort_values('resolution_date_dt').head(70).iterrows():
    print(r.qid, r.resolution_date, '|', str(r.title)[:210].replace('\n',' '), '| pred=', r.get('market_aggregate', r.get('my_prediction', None)))
missing=act[act['market_aggregate'].isna()] if 'market_aggregate' in act else act[act.get('my_prediction').isna()]
print('\nmissing_active_predictions', len(missing))
for _,r in missing.iterrows(): print(r.qid, r.resolution_date, r.title)
